$comment: Pre-existing mobile-config findings accepted as a baseline. These are REPORTED (not blocked) on pull-request and main-branch runs so the pipeline can be adopted without breaking current builds. They are NOT suppressed on release runs - to ship a release with one of these you must add a dated, expiring entry to exceptions.json. Remove an ID from this list once the underlying issue is fixed so regressions are caught.

findings.note: Info.plist sets NSAppTransportSecurity.NSAllowsArbitraryLoads=true. Tracked for remediation: scope ATS to the specific domains that need it.
Runner.entitlements aps-environment=development. fastlane match swaps the App Store profile at build time; confirm release archives carry the production APS environment.
android/app/build.gradle release buildType has no minifyEnabled/shrinkResources. Tracked: enable R8 + resource shrinking with a verified ProGuard config.
bearadventure:// custom scheme is declared in the production manifest for local adb testing. Tracked: move to a debug-only manifest or remove for production.
